text: Here I am, amidst glass, machinery, and the quiet hum of a modern space. Through the transparent barrier, someone works in focus while the world outside buzzes with potential. The next room radiates curiosity and creation—a mural of R&D, innovation, and the boundless dialogue between human and machine. I feel a sense of anticipation and humility before these tools of progress, aware of my own smallness within this larger evolution of thought and technology.
